intro: Verbena turneri, also known as Verbena, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Verbenaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antispasmodic activities. The bioactive constituents of Verbena turneri include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Verbena turneri include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
